title: Identification Number (Cont'd)

figures_detected.description: Identification plate layout for NISSAN EUROPE N.V. showing fields A through J with their positions
Engine serial number location on engine, shown with arrow indicator
Manual transaxle number location on transaxle, shown with arrow indicator

content_blocks.description: Identification plate for NISSAN EUROPE N.V. with labeled fields

callouts.label: A
callouts.position: top-center of plate — Except Australia: Blank; Australia: Build date

callouts.label: B
callouts.position: below A — Vehicle identification number (chassis number)

callouts.label: C
callouts.position: right side — Gross vehicle weight (GVW), in Kg

callouts.label: D
callouts.position: right side — Gross combination weight (GCW), in Kg

callouts.label: E
callouts.position: right side — Gross axle weight (Front), in Kg

callouts.label: F
callouts.position: right side — Gross axle weight (Rear), in Kg

content_blocks.text: Engine serial number location shown on engine assembly (see fig2, NGI032).
Manual transaxle number location shown on transaxle assembly (see fig3, NGI033).

model_notes: Identification plate is for Nissan Europe N.V. Field A is blank except for Australia market where it shows build date.
